title: Jonathan Mckay
compiled_truth: Jonathan Mckay is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-04-30), Jonathan Mckay sent 319 and received 863 emails, totalling 1182 interactions. Top correspondents: [Beth Jenkins](people/beth-jenkins) (30), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (29), [Chris Lambie](people/chris-lambie) (26), [Chance Rabon](people/chance-rabon) (16), [Kate Joslyn](people/kate-joslyn) (16).
